title: Contributing to Rcognito
text: good bug report shouldn’t leave others needing chase information. Therefore, ask investigate carefully, collect information describe issue detail report. Please complete following steps advance help us fix potential bug fast possible. Make sure using latest version. Determine bug really bug error side e.g. using incompatible environment components/versions. looking support, might want check section. see users experienced (potentially already solved) issue , check already bug report existing bug error bug tracker. Also make sure search internet (including Stack Overflow) see users outside GitHub community discussed issue. title: Authors and Citation
text: Shetty SJ (2026). RCognito: Simplified Interface 'Amazon Cognito'. R package version 0.2.0, https://sanjayshetty01.github.io/RCognito/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {RCognito: A Simplified Interface for 'Amazon Cognito'},   author = {Sanjaya J Shetty},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.2.0},   url = {https://sanjayshetty01.github.io/RCognito/}, }

what: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: RCognito R package designed simplify interaction Amazon Cognito services user-friendly API wrapper. Seamlessly authenticate users, manage user pools, perform common Cognito operations R. Empower R applications secure scalable identity management using Rcognito.

title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: can install RCognito package directly GitHub using remotes package:
code: # Install RCognito from CRAN install.packages("RCognito")  # Install RCognito from GitHub install.packages("remotes") remotes::install_github("SanjayShetty01/RCognito")

title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: using RCognito package, make sure set AWS credentials. can either following ways:

title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: Create edit .Renviron file R home directory add following:

title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: Alternatively, can set AWS credentials programmatically using Sys.setenv() function R script session:
code: # Set AWS credentials Sys.setenv(AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID = "your-access-key-id") Sys.setenv(AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY = "your-secret-access-key") Sys.setenv(AWS_REGION = "your-region")

title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: sign_up_user function allows sign new user AWS Cognito. accepts client_id, email, username, password parameters.
code: library(Rcognito)  # Sign up a new user sign_up_user(   client_id = "your-client-id",   email = "user@example.com",   username = "johndoe",   password = "password123" )

previous_headings: Usage > 1. Sign Up a New User
title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: client_id: AWS Cognito App client ID. email: user’s email address. username: user’s desired username. password: user’s password.

title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: user signed , need confirm sign-using verification code sent email. confirm_sign_up_user function helps .
code: # Confirm user sign-up confirm_sign_up_user(   client_id = "your-client-id",   userpool = "your-userpool-id",   username = "johndoe",   verification_code = "123456" )

title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: client_id: AWS Cognito App client ID. userpool: AWS Cognito User Pool ID. username: username user confirm. verification_code: verification code sent user’s email.

title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: user confirmed, can sign using username password sign_in function.
code: # Sign in a user user_info <- sign_in(   client_id = "your-client-id",   username = "johndoe",   password = "password123" )  # View user information print(user_info)

title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: client_id: AWS Cognito App client ID. username: username user sign . password: user’s password.

title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: Use change_password function change user’s password authenticated.
code: # Change user password change_password(   old_password = "old-password",    new_password = "new-password",    token = "user-access-token" )

title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: old_password: current password user. new_password: new password user. token: user’s access token.

title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: user forgets password, use forgot_password function initiate password reset process.
code: # Initiate forgot password request forgot_password(   client_id = "your-client-id",    username = "johndoe" )

title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: client_id: AWS Cognito App client ID. username: username user forgot password.

title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: receiving confirmation code, use confirm_forgot_password function set new password.
code: # Confirm forgot password with new password and confirmation code confirm_forgot_password(   client_id = "your-client-id",    username = "johndoe",    confirmation_code = "confirmation-code",    new_password = "new-password" )

title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: client_id: AWS Cognito App client ID. username: username user confirming forgot password. confirmation_code: confirmation code sent user. new_password: new password user wants set.

title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: RCognito allows integrate AWS Cognito user authentication Shiny applications. enables secure user sign-, sign-, password management session management, making restricting access sensitive features based authenticated user roles easier.

title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: RCognito can used secure API endpoints Plumber service validating AWS Cognito authentication tokens. ensures authorized users can access specific API endpoints perform actions require authentication.

what: 3. Integrating Cognito Authentication with R Scripts in Backend
title: A Simplified Interface for Amazon Cognito
text: using R scripts backend operations (e.g., data analysis, API interaction), RCognito facilitates secure authentication verifying user credentials allowing access sensitive tasks data.
